memberdef.argsstring: (amrex::Real x, amrex::Real y, amrex::Real z, amrex::Real t)
memberdef.name: wave_function

memberdef.argsstring: (amrex::GpuArray< std::unique_ptr< particle_groups< vdim >>, numspec > &part_gr, const int species)
memberdef.name: print_particles

memberdef.argsstring: (const amrex::GpuArray< std::unique_ptr< particle_groups< vdim >>, numspec > &part_gr, const int species)
memberdef.name: print_vMoments

param.type: const amrex::GpuArray< std::unique_ptr< particle_groups< vdim >>, numspec > &

briefdescription.para: Compute velocity moments based on particle distribution. Note that here the concept of SuperParticleType which agregates AoS and SoA in Particle<NStructReal+NArrayReal, NStructInt+NArrayInt> is used.

detaileddescription.para:
sonnen@ipp.mpg.de
0.1
2021-12-30
GEMPIC_sampler.H samples functions of the type (for vdim=3) !!! Formula only for 1 species \[f(x,v)= n_0(x) \left( \prod_{j=1}^{vdim}\frac{w_j}{\sqrt{2\pi v_{th,j}}}\exp(-\frac{(v_j-u_j)^2}{2v_{th,j}} \right) \] Analytical solution: \[\int f dx\,dv = \int n_0\, dx, \quad \int f v_j dx\,dv = u_j \int n_0\, dx, \quad \int f (v_1^2+v_2^2+v_3^2) dx\,dv = \sum_{j=1}^{vdim} (u_j^2+v_{th,j}^2) \int n_0\, dx \]
